review_method: PDFium visual review of rendered source pages at 2x raster scale; an item may be merged only when the later page fully contains the earlier page without losing a formula, label, arrow, diagram, example, or transition context.

candidates.reason: sampling-spectrum derivation is followed by a distinct time-domain/frequency-domain concept diagram
sampling reconstruction derivation is followed by a distinct interpolation conclusion and diagram
system frequency-response figure is followed by a new subsection transition
sampling-parameter relation diagram is followed by a separate DFS example
DFT property derivation is followed by a new exercise prompt
DFT property result is followed by a different worked example
DFT relation derivation is followed by a property subsection transition
complete sampling-parameter correspondence figure is followed by parameter definitions and the Nyquist relation
DIF-FFT derivation is followed by an algorithm summary
impulse-invariance comparison figure is followed by a distinct advantages statement
linear-phase FIR amplitude-property overview is followed by a worked example
worked derivation is followed by MATLAB implementation and response interpretation
example response plots are followed by the next symmetry case
chapter/subsection transition is followed by new amplitude-property material
odd-symmetry property conclusion is followed by a new worked example
worked response plots are followed by the next odd-symmetry case
odd-symmetry property conclusion is followed by a new worked example
worked response plots are followed by the section overview and next topic transition
